record.field:
Dear ${object.name},

Your certificate will expire on ${object.vendor_document_expiry}.

Please renew and share the updated certificate before the expiry date.

Thank you,
${user.company_id.name}
Offer Letter for the Position of ${object.job_id.name}

Dear ${object.partner_name},

Greetings from ${object.company_id.name}.

We are pleased to inform you that you have been selected for the position of ${object.job_id.name} with our organization.

Please find attached your Offer Letter, which contains the details regarding your role, compensation, and other employment terms.

Kindly review the document and confirm your acceptance by replying to this email. If you have any questions or require further clarification, feel free to contact us.

We look forward to welcoming you to our team and wish you a successful journey with ${object.company_id.name}.


Best Regards,
HR Department
${object.company_id.name}
